verses.text: “A ciltang a kitam ahih kei leh, a pasal na a cinglo mipa Topa-a' ding kikhopna sungah lutlo ding hi
“Zawlta peuhmah, Topa-a' ding kikhopna sungah lutlo ding hi. A suan a khak khang sawmna dong nangawnin Topa-a' ding kikhopna sungah tua bang mi kuamah lut theilo ding hi
“Ammon mite ahi a, Moab mite ahi zongin Topa-a' ding kikhopna sungah lut theilo ding uh hi. A khang sawmna dong nangawnun Topa-a' ding kikhopna sungah lut thei ngei peuhmahlo ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin na paikhiat lai-un lampi-ah an leh tui tawh amaute in note hong dawnlo uh a, note hong samsia dingin Mesopotamia gam Pethor khua panin Beor' tapa Balaam cial uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian un Balaam' thu ngailo hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong it ahih manin, Topa na Pasian un samsiatna pen note-a' dingin thupha-in hong heisakzaw hi
Amaute' nopsakna ding ahi a, a daupaina ding uh ahi zongin na khan'tawnun na hanciam kei ding uh hi
“Edom mite khatpeuh na mudah kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na sanggam uh ahi hi. Egypt mi khatpeuh na mudah kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' gamah peemta na hi ngei uh hi
Amaute' sung pana piang a khang thumna mite-a kipan Topa-a' ding kikhopna sungah lut thei ding uh hi.
“Na galte uh a do dingin kuanin giahphualah na om uh ciangin, siatna nam khempeuh panin nomau na kikem ding uh hi
Note lakah, zan sungin ama tungah thupiang hangin a sianglo mi a om leh giahphual pualamah amah paikhia ding a, giahphual sungah hong pailo ding hi
Ahih hangin nitak ciangin amahmah tui sungah kisil ding a, ni a tum ciangin giahphual sungah hong paithei ding hi
“Giahphual pua-ah awnghawhna ding mun khat na nei ding uh hi
Na galhiamte uh banah tulzum khat na nei ding uh a, awng na hawh khit uh ciangin tua tawh lei to-in, na ek uh na vuk ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh note hong hon ding leh note' mai-a na galte uh a hong pia dingin Topa na Pasian uh na giahphual laizang uhah hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin note lakah a kilawmlo nate a muhlohna ding leh note kiang panin amah a paikhiat lohna dingin na giahphual uh siangtho ding hi.
“A topa' kiang panin no kiangah a hong tai sila, a topa kiang mahah na apkik kei ding uh hi
Na khuapite uh lak panin ama teelna mun, ama lungkim penna, note lakah note tawh amah hong teng ding a, amah na nengniam kei ding uh hi
“Israel ta numeite biakinn sunga a paktat pawlin omlo ding uh a, Israel tapate zong a paktat pawlin omlo ding uh hi

A paktatnu a kiguaihna sum ahi a, a paktatpa a kiguaihna sum ahi zongin thuciamna khat peuhpeuh piakna-in Topa note' Pasian' inn sungah na paipih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hihte gel pen Topa note' Pasian' tungah a kihhuai ahi hi
“Na sanggampa tungah sumgum hita leh, ankhing hita leh, a meet ngaihsutna-in na khat peuhpeuh leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi

Gamdang mi tungah a meetin leitawi na pia thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggampa tungah a meetin leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi. Hihte pen a luah dingin na tumna uh gam sungah Topa na Pasian un na sepna khempeuh uhah thupha hong piak theihna ding ahi hi

“ Topa note' Pasian' tungah thuciamna na bawl ciangun na ciamna uh tungsak loin na ommawk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un hong kal teekteek ding a, note tungah khialhna hong hi ding hi
Ahih hangin thuciamna bawl ding pan na kikep uh leh note' sungah khialhna omlo ding hi
Na kam uh tawh na ciamsa uh thu pen Topa note' Pasian' tungah nomau utthu-a na ciam uh ahih manin na kam uh panin a gingkhia peuhmah na tun'sak ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi
“Na vengpa' leenggui lo-ah na pai uh ciangin na ut zahzah uh na kham dong uh leenggah na ne thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na van sung uhah na guang kei ding uh hi
Na vengpa' ankung ding laite lakah na pai uh ciangin na khut uh tawh a vuite na zut thei ding uh a, ahih hangin phiaukawi tawh na vengpa' ankung ding laite na at kei ding uh hi.
